evals.prompt: Can you check the coverage for {PROJECT}-{ID}? I want to know if we have enough test cases before we ship this sprint. We're planning a release next week and the QE lead asked me to run a coverage check.
evals.expected_output: Fetches {PROJECT}-{ID}, extracts ACs with platform info, searches Zephyr for linked TCs, produces coverage_analysis_report.md with Dashboard (covered/partial/not-covered %), AC heatmap with risk scores, and prioritized action plan. Does NOT create any new test cases.

evals.prompt: {PROJECT}-{ID} coverage audit please. I'm a QE manager and I need to know which acceptance criteria don't have test cases yet, and whether any of the existing TCs have quality issues like wrong labels or combined steps that could mask failures.
evals.expected_output: Runs full coverage audit: maps each AC to TCs, flags partial/uncovered slots, identifies TC quality issues (traceability gaps, combined TCs, generic objectives). Surfaces QE debt items. Outputs coverage_analysis_report.md. Does not create TCs.

evals.prompt: Before we close {PROJECT}-{ID}, can you give me the test coverage breakdown? I need to show the release manager what percentage of ACs are covered and what the risk is if we ship with the current gaps.
evals.expected_output: Produces coverage_analysis_report.md with Executive Dashboard showing coverage %, Prioritized Action Plan with P1 must-have TCs before release, and release readiness verdict. Risk-scores each coverage gap.

evals.prompt: Generate test cases for {PROJECT}-{ID}. I want to create Zephyr TCs for all the acceptance criteria in this ticket.
evals.expected_output: Should NOT trigger this skill — should trigger quality-engineering-zephyr-test-generation instead. This is a TC creation request, not a coverage analysis request.

should_not_trigger: Create Zephyr TCs for {PROJECT}-{ID} and tag them for regression
Analyze the business logic of the 'Add to Cart' flow in {PROJECT}-{ID}
Explain why the ACs in this ticket are poorly written
Write a unit test for the coverage calculation service
Schedule a meeting with the business analyst to discuss ACs
What is the difference between a test case and a test plan?
Show me the last 5 commits for the zephyr-service.ts file
Fix the failing build on the jenkins pipeline for this feature
Convert these manual tests into Playwright automation scripts
Update the README.md with the new deployment instructions
